*A nostalgic great taste, [last time in Kobe I specially went to eat Kobe beef](https://zhgchg.li/posts/z-%E5%BA%A6%E6%97%85%E8%A1%8C%E9%81%8A%E8%A8%98/%E5%B1%B1%E9%99%B0%E9%97%9C%E8%A5%BF%E8%87%AA%E7%94%B1%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%BB%E7%95%A5-%E5%B3%B6%E6%A0%B9%E5%87%BA%E9%9B%B2%E6%9D%BE%E6%B1%9F%E9%B3%A5%E5%8F%96%E5%A7%AC%E8%B7%AF%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E7%A5%9E%E6%88%B67%E6%97%A5%E7%8D%A8%E6%97%85%E5%85%A8%E8%A8%98%E9%8C%84-aacd5f5cacd1/#1700-%E7%A5%9E%E6%88%B8%E7%89%9B-%E5%90%89%E7%A5%A5%E5%90%89){:target="_blank"} (Kissho Kichi), the price in Tokyo is about ¥8,000 more expensive than in Kobe (Prime Kobe beef sirloin 220g Tokyo ¥39,160 / Kobe ¥31,600).*

translations.*日式粉粉的炸串好吃不膩，牛腩飯很入味墊墊胃。*\n\n: *The Japanese-style crispy fried skewers are delicious and not greasy, and the beef brisket rice is flavorful and filling.*

translations.*最後沒扭什麼，這邊機台雖然多但是沒看到什麼特別的而且分類蠻亂的逛得眼花撩亂。*: *In the end, I didn't play much. Although there were many machines here, nothing special caught my eye, and the categories were quite messy, making it overwhelming to browse.*

translations.在這裏吃了麵包可頌果腹。\n\n: Ate croissants here to fill up.
translations.地下街人很多，什麼 IP 幾乎都有，三麗鷗、航海王、Jump Store、拉拉熊: The underground mall is crowded, featuring almost every IP you can think of: Sanrio, One Piece, Jump Store, Rilakkuma, Acorn Republic, Snoopy, Chiikawa, and more.
translations.地板有點濕潤，天氣多雲，看來稍早下過大雨；抵達後就開始成田機場大地遊戲(下機走到: The floor was a bit wet, and the weather was cloudy, indicating it had rained earlier; after arrival, we started the Narita Airport scavenger hunt (it takes about 5 minutes to walk from the plane to immigration).
translations.地理位置大致如上圖。\n\n: The general location is as shown in the image above.
translations.場地不大，外面有三個水池有三隻水獺在裡面趴趴走，可以買零食餵他(¥880)。 (: The venue is small, with three pools outside where three otters roam around. You can buy snacks to feed them (¥880). (They will reach out their paws)
translations.多湯、沙拉、冰淇淋\n: Multiple soups, salads, and ice cream
translations.天氣陰陰，但優點是不會太曬！\n\n: The weather was overcast, but the advantage was that it wasn't too sunny!
translations.如果日期前行程有異動可以免費取消。\n: If there are changes to the itinerary before the date, cancellation is free of charge.
translations.如果零錢不夠可以跟神社人員換錢、旁邊有志工可以免費幫忙英文解籤，如果抽到不好的籤: If you don't have enough coins, you can exchange money with the shrine staff. Volunteers nearby can help translate the fortune slips into English for free. If you get a bad fortune, just tie it to the shrine to ward off bad luck.
translations.左邊真的吃的麵包、果醬店需要抽整理券入場；右邊周邊娃娃店則不用。\n\n: The bakery and jam shop on the left require a numbered ticket for entry; the doll shop on the right does not.
translations.往數字越來越小的方向走就會到中間連接大廳，吃的買的都在這。\n\n: Walk toward the smaller numbers to reach the central connecting hall, where you can find food and shopping.
translations.很可惜 [極味屋](https://maps.app.goo.gl/B11rcg: Unfortunately, [Gokumiya](https://maps.app.goo.gl/B11rcg3MLFRgJLqT8){:target="_blank"} was sold out (will come back in a few days), so I tried another kushikatsu shop in the same food street.
translations.後面(步道)的人很多。\n\n: There are many people on the trail behind.
translations.從不忍口出來過馬路就是 Skyliner 京成上野了。(不確定有沒有其他更近的出: I couldn't help but say that crossing the street leads directly to the Skyliner at Keisei Ueno. (Not sure if there's a closer exit, but I didn't wander around to avoid getting lost.)
translations.從網路先買比較便宜，到車站再劃位，彈性好用\n: Buying online first is cheaper, then reserving seats at the station offers good flexibility.
translations.意外發現二航出境免稅店有 Le Labo，櫃姐有介紹現在有活動，新會員領券折抵後: Unexpectedly found Le Labo at Terminal 2 departure duty-free shop. The sales clerk mentioned a promotion where new members get a coupon, making the 50ml price NT $5,500, cheaper than buying inside Japan (about NT $5,800).
translations.感覺不用這麼早到熱海，人沒有想像中多；大概 18:30 之前來都還有沙灘位子，即: It doesn't feel necessary to arrive in Atami so early; the crowd is not as large as expected. Before around 18:30, there are still spots available on the beach, and even by the 20:20 fireworks show, there are still places to watch.
translations.感謝您跟我一起體驗這次的東京五日遊，希望文中的資訊對您的下一次旅行有所幫助。\n: Thank you for joining me on this five-day trip to Tokyo. I hope the information in this article helps with your next travel adventure.
translations.應該是目前最快從成田機場到東京市區(上野)的方式。\n\n: This is probably the fastest way to get from Narita Airport to central Tokyo (Ueno).
translations.成田機場免稅店真的什麼都有，除了精品保養品菸酒外，也有很玩整的伴手禮店，什麼有，: Narita Airport duty-free shops really have everything. Besides luxury goods, skincare products, tobacco, and alcohol, there are also fun souvenir shops with a wide variety of items. Prices are similar to or even cheaper than outside. If you haven't bought enough, you can take advantage of last-minute shopping before boarding.
translations.成田特快的位子夠大，28 寸行李箱放得下；如果覺得卡可以放在車前車後的區域，或是: The seats on the Narita Express are spacious enough to fit a 28-inch suitcase. If it's tight, you can place your luggage in the areas in front of or behind the seats, or on the luggage rack (just be careful when taking it down).
translations.我以為麻布台之森只有 [JP Tower](https://maps.app.g: I thought Azabudai no Mori only had [JP Tower](https://maps.app.goo.gl/yyYwwHoZbHBmysqN6){:target="_blank"}, but it’s actually a whole cluster of fragmented buildings with many department store counters and dining options.
translations.我們加了 ¥880/人 跟水獺親密互動 5 分鐘，不然其實都摸不到。\n\n: We added ¥880 per person for a 5-minute close interaction with the otters; otherwise, you can't actually touch them.
translations.我們是買 18:40~18:59 夜景的時段，也可以選擇早一點看夕陽或是最末場: We bought tickets for the 18:40–18:59 night view slot. You can also choose an earlier time to watch the sunset or the last session at 21:00 after dinner.
translations.托運完就直接去排出境了(累)。\n\n: After checking in my luggage, I went straight to line up for departure (tired).
translations.抓準最後的時間在上野逛逛。\n\n: Spend the last moments strolling around Ueno.
translations.投了一罐蘋果汽水續命，遇到其他地區大雨影響，所有班次都誤點。\n\n: Bought a can of apple soda to recharge, but heavy rain in other areas caused all trains to be delayed.
translations.拍拍照逛了一圈大約 12:45 離開冰川神社，準備搭車去小江戶街跟 吉伊卡哇 M: After taking some photos and walking around, we left Hikawa Shrine at about 12:45, ready to take a bus to Koedo Street and Jiikawa MOGUMOGU Honpo Kawagoe store.
translations.拍照起來也很魔幻。\n\n: The photos also look very magical.
translations.招牌水果千層蛋糕(Mille Crepes/ミルクレープ) 1カット ￥1,05: Signature Fruit Mille Crepes (Mille Crepes/ミルクレープ) 1 slice ￥1,050 + minimum order of one drink.
translations.接近中午，先在車站內覓食。\n\n: Approaching noon, we first looked for food inside the station.
translations.接近晚餐時間，想說先在百貨公司吃一吃，最後直接在 Parco 選擇吃牛舌。\n\: As dinner time approached, I decided to eat at the department store first and ended up choosing beef tongue at Parco.
translations.搭山手線到上野。\n\n: Take the Yamanote Line to Ueno.
translations.新幹線出站後還要再通過在來線閘口(給工作人員看車票 QRCode 即可出來)。\: After exiting the Shinkansen, you still need to pass through the conventional line ticket gate (just show the staff your ticket QR code to exit).
translations.新幹線這裡很空曠、冷氣很涼。\n\n: The Shinkansen here is very spacious and the air conditioning is cool.
translations.新橋站出來走一下就到了，非常方便！\n\n: It's just a short walk from Shimbashi Station, very convenient!
translations.旁邊還有一間二號店。\n\n: There is also a second store next door.
translations.日本門市退完稅價格：約 NT $5,700\n: Tax-refunded price at Japanese stores: approximately NT $5,700
translations.時間還很早，再次來到澀谷，先來吃極味屋。\n\n: It's still early, so I came back to Shibuya and started with a meal at Gokumiya.
translations.最後再一路經過大正浪漫通，搭公車回川越站，準備回池袋。\n\n: Finally, we passed through Taisho Romantic Street and took a bus back to Kawagoe Station, preparing to return to Ikebukuro.
translations.最後回到公園口提領了行李走了一大圈才又回到京成上野。\n\n: Finally, I returned to the park exit to pick up my luggage, walked around a large area, and then went back to Keisei Ueno.
translations.最後手癢買了一瓶 26–30ml (機場限定 Size)，實刷 $3,720 台: Finally, I couldn't resist and bought a 26–30ml (airport exclusive size) bottle, spending NT$3,720.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有好幾個魚池可以自己釣鯛魚御神籤XD，我是釣紅色的一年安鯛。\n\n: There are several fish ponds where you can catch sea bream for omikuji XD I caught a red one for a year of good luck.
translations.有很多 Snoopy、三麗鷗、寶可夢、拉拉熊…等等 IP\n\n: There are many IPs like Snoopy, Sanrio, Pokémon, Rilakkuma, and more.
translations.有點像 [**前年去廣島、岡山**](../31b9b3a63abc/) 住的「: It's somewhat like the [**trip to Hiroshima and Okayama two years ago**](../31b9b3a63abc/) where we stayed at the "[Rifumax Okayama Kurashiki Ekimae Hotel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gmwHRihsyXI){:target="_blank"}." The room was very small, feeling like a single room but with a double bed.
translations.東京其他地方也有分店可以去 [官網查看](https://harinezumi-: There are branches in other parts of Tokyo as well. Check the [official website](https://harinezumi-cafe.com/store/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.東京市區+近郊 5 天 4 夜自由行，熱海花火大會與川越一日遊交通、體驗全攻略\: Tokyo City + Suburbs 5 Days 4 Nights Free Travel: Complete Guide to Transportation and Experiences for Atami Fireworks Festival and Kawagoe Day Trip
translations.東武東上線往返：池袋站 -> 川越站或川越市站\n: Tobu Tojo Line round trip: Ikebukuro Station -> Kawagoe Station or Kawagoe-shi Station
translations.東西放完就出發去澀谷。\n\n: After putting our things down, we set off for Shibuya.
translations.機型 BOEING 737–800 跟來的時候ㄧ樣。\n\n: The aircraft model is BOEING 737–800, same as on the way here.
translations.歡迎蒞臨 2025 熱海海上花火大會！\n\n: Welcome to the 2025 Atami Sea Fireworks Festival!
translations.池袋這邊也很熱鬧，人很多店也很多。\n\n: Ikebukuro is also very lively, with many people and numerous shops.
translations.沒劃到 15:16 的班次，只能搭 15:42 的。\n\n: Couldn’t get a seat on the 15:16 train, so I have to take the 15:42 one.
translations.沒抽到 [整理券](https://chiikawa-info.jp/chiik: Didn't get a [ticket](https://chiikawa-info.jp/chiikawaland/tokyo/){:target="_blank"}, so I just passed by to take some photos. The stock looked ample and there were few people (feels like they didn't control the crowd enough?).
translations.沒特別逛，怕找不到地方寄物，就在車站內的寄物櫃臺寄物了。\n\n: Didn’t explore much; worried about not finding a place to store luggage, so I used the locker counter inside the station.
translations.海灘周圍也都有廁所，不怕沒得上。\n\n: There are restrooms around the beach, so you don't have to worry about not having access.
translations.無意間發現機上有提供免費一小時的 WiFi 上網。\n\n: Accidentally discovered that the plane offers one hour of free WiFi.
translations.無需兌換，只需要要使用前線上點兌換，出示 QRCode 進入電車或巴士司機即可。: No need to exchange; just redeem online before use and show the QR code to the train or bus driver.
translations.煙火大約在上圖位置釋放，可以走到 [Higashikaigancho](http: The fireworks are launched roughly at the location shown in the picture above. You can walk to [Higashikaigancho](https://maps.app.goo.gl/XZmFfi3wDBJFERyQ8){:target="_blank"} and wait on the beach further back. Here, you can also go into the water, and there are shared restrooms and showers nearby for changing. (However, it's recommended to check in advance, as some facilities may be old and poorly maintained.)
translations.煙火有好幾 Part 一路放到 20:40 (20分鐘)，最喜歡的 Part 是: The fireworks had several parts and lasted until 20:40 (20 minutes). My favorite part was the magnificent full-screen fireworks. Unfortunately, the humidity was high today, so the smoke didn't disperse well towards the end.
translations.熱海沙灘還能遠眺熱海城。\n\n: You can also see Atami Castle from Atami Beach in the distance.
translations.特色是和牛小漢堡。\n\n: The specialty is Wagyu mini burgers.
translations.登機門 67B 在很角落，很遠；遺憾是一路上的販賣機都沒看到賣桃子水。\n\n: Gate 67B is in a remote corner, quite far away; unfortunately, there were no vending machines selling peach water along the way.
translations.目前雙 K 都在打機場接送，便宜安全又快速，可以自行比價選擇。\n: Currently, both K services offer airport transfers that are affordable, safe, and fast. You can compare prices and choose on your own.
translations.直接從二樓天橋出站往巴士搭乘處下樓。\n\n: Exit from the second-floor skybridge and go downstairs to the bus boarding area.
translations.直接進最旁邊的 駅事務室，給車站人員看 QRCode 就能直接進出站。(無需劃位: Go directly to the station office at the side and show the QR code to the staff to enter and exit the station. (No seat reservation needed)
translations.看「京成線」指示牌進站後找到對應的月台候車。\n\n: Follow the signs for the "Keisei Line" to enter the station, then find the corresponding platform to wait.
translations.看完一路往下走，經過 Bar，這邊的景也不錯：\n\n: After walking all the way down, passing by the bar, the view here is also nice:
translations.睡飽搭公車出門。\n\n: After a good sleep, take the bus out.
translations.神社不大，有很多風車風鈴。\n\n: The shrine is small and has many pinwheels and wind chimes.
translations.票蠻多的，不過還是建議出發前提前購買。\n: There are quite a few tickets available, but it is still recommended to purchase them in advance before departure.
translations.穿過商店街出來一路往下走就會到海灘了。\n\n: Walk straight down after passing through the shopping street, and you will reach the beach.
translations.終於看到 Skyliner 京成上野 站了。\n\n: Finally saw the Skyliner Keisei Ueno Station.
translations.經典豆皮泡麵＋超商炸雞＋酒。\n\n: Classic tofu skin instant noodles + convenience store fried chicken + alcohol.
translations.繼續漫步小江戶商店街到時之鐘。\n\n: Continue strolling along the Koedo shopping street to Toki no Kane (Time Bell Tower).
translations.裡面沒有地圖，如果想全部探索可以先在外面拿官方手冊。\n\n: There is no map inside. If you want to explore everything, you can first get the official guidebook outside.
translations.裡面的話場地也不大，中間一曲水獺付費互動區(要加價)、旁邊是龍貓互動區(要加價): The venue itself is not very large. In the middle, there is a paid interactive otter area (additional fee required), next to it is a paid Totoro interactive area, and on the other side is a free hedgehog interactive area, along with a few otters inside a fenced enclosure.
translations.請注意：巴士有西武跟東武，此票券為東武\n: Please note: There are Seibu and Tobu buses; this ticket is for Tobu.
translations.買了一些東西，因為寄物櫃臺只開到晚上 20:00，所以找置物櫃寄物，這邊也有很多: Bought some items. Since the locker counter closes at 8:00 PM, I looked for lockers to store my belongings. There are many lockers available here.
translations.買了旁邊攤販的章魚燒仙貝當點心。\n\n: Bought takoyaki rice crackers from a nearby stall as a snack.
translations.買個宵夜回飯店休息。\n\n: Bought a late-night snack and returned to the hotel to rest.
translations.走到一個古蹟建築的二樓咖啡廳隨便吃個東西再出發。\n\n: Went to a second-floor café in a historic building to grab a quick bite before heading out.
translations.趁著新工作剛上工先把電充飽， [再訪東京](../9da2c51fa4f2/): Taking advantage of the start of my new job to recharge, [Revisiting Tokyo](../9da2c51fa4f2/) — experiencing a once-in-a-lifetime Japanese fireworks festival and a day trip to Kawagoe near Tokyo.
translations.距離新橋站走路約 2 分鐘，很近。\n: About a 2-minute walk from Shimbashi Station, very close.
translations.跟懷念中的滋味一樣，肉很嫩、沒有異味只有牛肉該有的香氣；不知不覺一下就吃完了！\: Just like the taste I remembered, the meat is tender with no off-flavors, only the natural aroma of beef; before I knew it, it was all gone!
translations.路線有點奇妙，需要先下到月台再從另一個出口上去，出來才會是不忍改口。\n\n: The route is a bit unusual; you need to go down to the platform first, then exit from another exit to reach Shinobazu Guchi.
translations.車站這邊有賣 [Welcome Suica (28 天內要用完)](https:: At the station, you can buy the [Welcome Suica (must be used within 28 days)](https://www.jreast.co.jp/zh-CHT/multi/welcomesuica/welcomesuica.html){:target="_blank"} and use the regular Suica card recharge machines. You can top up the amount needed for your trip while waiting for your train. ([But I personally find using Suica on my iPhone more convenient and easy!](https://zhgchg.li/posts/z-%E5%BA%A6%E6%97%85%E8%A1%8C%E9%81%8A%E8%A8%98/%E4%BA%AC%E9%98%AA%E7%A5%9E%E8%87%AA%E7%94%B1%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%BB%E7%95%A5-%E4%BA%AC%E9%83%BD%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E7%A5%9E%E6%88%B68%E6%97%A5%E9%81%8A%E5%85%A8%E7%B4%80%E9%8C%84%E8%88%87%E5%AF%A6%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%A4%E9%80%9A%E4%BD%8F%E5%AE%BF%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97-76d66c2e34af/#-2){:target="_blank"})
translations.轉搭 東武東上線 前往川越。\n\n: Transfer to Tobu Tojo Line to Kawagoe.
translations.轉搭山手線回新橋。\n\n: Transfer to the Yamanote Line back to Shimbashi.
translations.轉頭去吃對面的神戶牛。\n\n: Turn around and go eat Kobe beef across the street.
translations.這個地下道有很多投幣式置物櫃，而且很空。\n\n: This underground passage has many coin-operated lockers, and they are mostly empty.
translations.這時間來人沒有太多，稍微排隊一下就吃到了。\n\n: At this time, there weren't many people, so after a short wait, we got to eat.
translations.這月台有很多種車次會經過停靠，請務必確認後再上車；工作人員也會沿途宣導，可以給他: Many types of trains stop at this platform, so please make sure to check before boarding; staff will also announce along the way. You can show your ticket for confirmation. [**Narita Express is fully reserved seating with no non-reserved seats**](https://www.jreast.co.jp/tc/downloads/pdf/ntrt10_tc.pdf){:target="_blank"} **, do not board without a ticket**.
translations.這次搭到的飛機是 BOEING 737–800 機型有點老舊。\n\n: The plane I took this time was a BOEING 737–800 model, which is a bit outdated.
translations.這裡樓上有兩間吉伊卡哇餐廳，咖啡廳路過看預約全滿、拉麵是現場排隊就能入場。\n\: Upstairs, there are two Jiikawa restaurants. The café was fully booked when we passed by, but the ramen shop allowed entry with on-site queueing.
translations.這邊看得到澀谷十字路口。\n\n: You can see the Shibuya Crossing from here.
translations.這邊走出來就是上野動物園，左轉， **準備先去 Skyliner 京成上野 劃位: Exit here and you'll be at Ueno Zoo. Turn left, **ready to reserve a seat for the Skyliner at Keisei Ueno.**
translations.逛一逛時間接近下午 15:00 了，中午只吃了一塊水果千層，有點飢餓，隨便找了一: By the time I finished walking around, it was nearly 3:00 PM. I had only eaten a piece of fruit mille-feuille for lunch and was a bit hungry, so I randomly picked a highly rated American burger joint I passed by to grab a bite.
translations.逛不夠還可以去隔壁大丸百貨或繼續走到其他周圍地下街。\n\n: If you haven't had enough shopping, you can also visit the adjacent Daimaru Department Store or continue walking to other nearby underground shopping streets.
translations.逛完時間接近 14:00，實在太餓太累了。\n\n: After shopping, it was almost 14:00, and I was really hungry and tired.
translations.進站成功會吐出車票(純方便看資訊或車上遇到驗票用)，出入站還是要用手機 QRCo: Entering the station successfully will print out a ticket (for easy information viewing or ticket inspection on the train), but you still need to use the mobile QR code for entry and exit.
translations.過馬路一路往 澀谷 Parco 走，想去吃 [極味屋](https://maps: Cross the street and walk straight to Shibuya Parco to eat at [極味屋](https://maps.app.goo.gl/B11rcg3MLFRgJLqT8){:target="_blank"}.
translations.門口有很多可愛的寶寶，川越限定的地瓜系列。\n\n: At the entrance, there are many cute babies and a sweet potato series exclusive to Kawagoe.
translations.開賣時間：台灣時間晚間 11:00 可購買 +4 週後日期的車票\n: Sale Time: Tickets for dates +4 weeks ahead can be purchased starting at 11:00 PM Taiwan time
translations.隨便亂逛又走來上次就是在這家 Le Labo 買香水的店，2025 日本境內價格: Just wandering around, I ended up at the same Le Labo store where I bought perfume last time. In 2025, the price for 50ml perfume in Japan is ¥31,350, and after tax refund, it's about ¥28,500.
translations.雖然還是實行全天人數管制，但人潮沒有剛開幕的時候多了，我們是到現場才掃 QRCo: Although there is still full-day capacity control, the crowds are not as large as when it first opened. We arrived on-site and scanned the QR code to book the next available time slot at 13:40 (there were still spots). If you want to avoid missing out, you can book online in advance.
translations.雖然飛機有點年紀，但是飛機餐真的不錯，漢堡肉肉醬斜管麵，還有一碗小蕎麥豆皮涼麵跟: Although the plane is a bit old, the in-flight meal was really good: hamburger meat sauce with penne pasta, a small bowl of cold soba noodles with tofu skin, and a lemon pudding dessert (delicious!).
translations.離場的人潮非常多，不過大家都很有秩序地慢慢往車站移動；來的時候是下坡，回去是上坡: There were many people leaving, but everyone moved toward the station in an orderly manner; it was downhill coming in and uphill going back (tiring).
translations.頂樓夜景，不過相較上次，這次天氣比較差，霧濛濛還帶點毛毛細雨。\n\n: Rooftop night view, but compared to last time, the weather was worse this time—foggy with a light drizzle.
translations.順便先去買 Sugar Butter Tree 當伴手禮。\n\n: Also, buy Sugar Butter Tree as a souvenir.
translations.預計搭乘下午 14:57 的新幹線前往熱海。\n\n: Planning to take the 14:57 Shinkansen to Atami.
translations.飛機餐一樣很優秀，是咖喱豬排飯跟甜點哈根達斯。\n\n: The airplane meal was also excellent, featuring curry pork cutlet rice and Haagen-Dazs dessert.
translations.飯店提供的免費備品非常多，還有面膜、入浴劑、耳塞、隨身攜帶的漱口水…等\n\n: The hotel provides a wide range of free amenities, including face masks, bath additives, earplugs, portable mouthwash, and more.
translations.點了幾個招牌炸串跟肉加倍炸串還有一碗牛腩飯跟兩杯酒，一共 ¥6,340 日幣。\: Ordered several signature fried skewers, double meat skewers, a bowl of beef brisket rice, and two drinks, totaling ¥6,340 JPY.
